fix.item: [J3x] Root galleryíes view: Pagination regards config setting
[J3x] Root galleryíes view: Show slideshow link only on galleries when images exists
Commands "rotate degrees, flip" in 'edit image' or 'Add image properties' views are not ignored any more

change.item: used jrector to apply j!5 code requirements

addition.item: [J3x] Root galleryíes view: Sub galleries will be shown in same row as parent on the right side
API (webservices) for upload, images, galleries and more

note.item: Minimum Joomla version is now J!5x

fix.item: Slide page had wrong pagination links

change.item: Removed text on sidebar, so more space for the page itself as only icons are showing
The URL part 'gid=' has been replaced by 'id=' to comply with Joomla SEF rules
Improved transfer of J3x RSG2 Version data to actual version
Checked options for using same names from configuration to menu

fix.item: Can not find view in menu path: Upper case in template and module files

addition.item: J3x Menu structure will be automatically adjusted (J3x Menus definitions shall work seamless)
Introduce slide pages for single images view
